DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT PAGE, DAMENA
CORRESPONDENCE -12/1/21 RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT PAGE, DAMENA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF JIMMY GUTIERREZ SR. IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAMENA PAGE VIA ROBIN BONNER (COURT ALLOWED). MS. PAGE INFORMED THE COURT VIA PHONE THAT SHE RECEIVED THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FUNDS. PLAINTIFF SENT IN RECEIPTS VIA CORROSPONDENCE TO THE COURT FOR PAYMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506) JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-04-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-02-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JIMMY GUTIERREZ SR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAMENA PAGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE THROUGH THE USE OF DEFENDANT'S WITNESS ROBIN BONNER'S CELL PHONE FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY JAIL IS ALLOWED. DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR BY ZOOM DUE TO INTERNET/WIFI ISSUES FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY JAIL. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED TO KEEP POSSESION OF THE DOG FOR PAYMENT OF $800.00 TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF IS TO DEPOSIT PAYMENT OF $800.00 ON DEFENDANT'S BOOKS WITH SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY JAIL. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, COURT WILL ASSES PUNITIVE DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS TO COVER ANY AND ALL FEES ASSOCIATED WITH THE DEPOSIT INTO DEFENDANT'S BOOK. PROOF OF DEPOSIT TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR PROOF OF PAYMENT. UPON PROOF OF PAYMENT, DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM WILL ALSO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ON THIS DATE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,743.00 FILED BY GUTIERREZ SR, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, DAMENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
